ontology_relation_candidates.label: broadcast_type
ontology_relation_candidates.description: Indicates the type of broadcast service, such as free-to-air, subscription-based, or other broadcast modalities.
ontology_relation_candidates.justification: The relation is semantically stable and reusable across documents, aligning with ontology hints like broadcast_type, television_service, radio_service, and unencrypted_service. It captures a meaningful property of broadcast services beyond isolated mentions.

evidence.snippet: Skai TV is a Greek free - to - air television network based in Piraeus . It is part of the Skai Group , one of the largest media groups in the country . It was relaunched in its present form on lst of April 2006 in the Athens metropolitan area , and gradually spread its coverage nationwide . Besides

ontology_relation_candidates.label: dubbing
ontology_relation_candidates.description: Relates a media entity (e.g., a broadcaster or production company) to a work that it has produced or modified by replacing or augmenting the original soundtrack with new recordings, typically for translation or localization purposes.
ontology_relation_candidates.justification: The relation is semantically stable, reusable across documents, and captures a meaningful process that occurs in media production. It does not duplicate existing ontology properties and aligns with the DocRED style of surface mentions.
